blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,035 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
